steps.title: Identify the central angle from the diagram
steps.content: The small square marked at center $O$ indicates a right angle, so the central angle $\angle AOC = 90°$.

steps.title: Apply the arc length formula
steps.content:
Arc length is proportional to its central angle:
$$\text{Arc length} = \frac{\theta}{360°} \times C$$
Substituting the central angle and circumference:
$$\text{Arc } AC = \frac{90°}{360°} \times 36 = \frac{1}{4} \times 36 = 9$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
